title: asystasia guttata
intro: Asystasia guttata, also known as the gold dust vine or yellow passion flower, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Asystasia guttata include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and infections. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and may also be used in the form of a poultice or salve to treat various health conditions.
